LanguageData.FCP_Melee_9_Iron.description: A pre-war golf club, the 9 iron. The weighted head and long shaft make for surprisingly effective swings. Fore!
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_9_Iron.label: 9 Iron
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_9_Iron.tools.0.label: grip
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_9_Iron.tools.1.label: club head
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Bat.description: A classic wooden baseball bat, repurposed as a simple but effective melee weapon. While not designed for combat, a solid swing can break bones and deter attackers.
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Bat.label: Baseball Bat
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Bat.tools.0.label: handle
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Bat.tools.1.label: bat
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Bat_Aluminum.description: A lightweight aluminum baseball bat. More durable than its wooden counterpart and capable of delivering faster, harder swings. A favorite among wasteland brawlers.
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Bat_Aluminum.label: Aluminum Bat
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Bat_Aluminum.tools.0.label: handle
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Bat_Aluminum.tools.1.label: bat
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Bat_Saw.description: A baseball bat modified with circular saw blades attached to its head. A brutal and terrifying weapon that can slice through flesh and armor alike.
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Bat_Saw.label: Saw Bat
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Bat_Saw.tools.0.label: handle
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Bat_Saw.tools.1.label: saw blades
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Bat_Spiked.description: A baseball bat with nails and metal spikes driven through the head. Turns a simple blunt weapon into something far more vicious, capable of tearing flesh as well as breaking bones.
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Bat_Spiked.label: Spiked Bat
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Bat_Spiked.tools.0.label: handle
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Bat_Spiked.tools.1.label: spiked head
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Board_Spiked.description: A simple wooden board with nails driven through it. Crude but effective, this makeshift weapon is common among raiders and desperate survivors.
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Board_Spiked.label: Spiked Board
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Board_Spiked.tools.0.label: board
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Board_Spiked.tools.1.label: nails
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Bumper_Sword.description: A massive blade forged from a pre-war car bumper. Heavy and unwieldy, but capable of cleaving through enemies with tremendous force. A favorite of super mutants and other hulking wastelanders.
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Bumper_Sword.label: Bumper Sword
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Bumper_Sword.tools.0.label: handle
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Bumper_Sword.tools.1.label: blade
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Chainsaw.description: A pre-war chainsaw repurposed for combat. The roaring engine and spinning chain make for a terrifying and deadly weapon, capable of tearing through flesh and light armor.
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Chainsaw.label: Chainsaw
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Chainsaw.tools.0.label: handle
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Chainsaw.tools.1.label: chain
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Meat_Cleaver.description: A heavy butcher's cleaver designed for cutting through meat and bone. In the wasteland, it serves just as well against human targets.
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Meat_Cleaver.label: Meat Cleaver
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Meat_Cleaver.tools.0.label: handle
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Meat_Cleaver.tools.1.label: blade
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Mr_Handy_Buzz_Blade.descriptio: A circular saw blade salvaged from a Mr. Handy robot, modified with a grip for handheld use. The spinning blade can slice through almost anything with ease.
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Mr_Handy_Buzz_Blade.label: Mr. Handy Buzz Blade
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Pool_Cue.description: A long wooden pool cue. While fragile compared to dedicated weapons, its reach and ability to deliver quick pokes make it useful in a pinch.
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Pool_Cue.label: Pool Cue
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Pool_Cue.tools.0.label: tip
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Pool_Cue.tools.1.label: shaft
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Rebar_Club.description: A heavy length of construction rebar wrapped with tape for a grip. Simple, brutal, and readily available in the ruins of the old world.
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Rebar_Club.label: Rebar Club
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Rebar_Club.tools.0.label: handle
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Rebar_Club.tools.1.label: head
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Ripper.description: A compact handheld chainsaw designed by the U.S. military for close-quarters combat. The small, fast-spinning chain can rip through flesh and armor with horrifying efficiency.
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Ripper.label: Ripper
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Ripper.tools.0.label: handle
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Ripper.tools.1.label: chain
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Rolling_Pin.description: A wooden rolling pin typically used for baking. In the wasteland, even kitchen utensils can become weapons. Light and fast, if not particularly deadly.
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Rolling_Pin.label: Rolling Pin
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Rolling_Pin.tools.0.label: handle
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Rolling_Pin.tools.1.label: roller
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Scrap_Axe.description: An improvised axe made from scrap metal and a wooden handle. Rough but effective for both chopping wood and splitting skulls.
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Scrap_Axe.label: Scrap Axe
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Scrap_Axe.tools.0.label: handle
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Scrap_Axe.tools.1.label: edge
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Scrap_Machete.description: A crude machete fashioned from scrap metal. The blade is rough but sharp enough to hack through flesh and vegetation alike.
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Scrap_Machete.label: Scrap Machete
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Scrap_Machete.tools.0.label: handle
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Scrap_Machete.tools.1.label: blade
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Scrap_Pipe.description: A length of metal pipe scavenged from old plumbing or industrial ruins. Heavy and durable, making for a reliable bludgeoning weapon.
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Scrap_Pipe.label: Scrap Pipe
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Scrap_Pipe.tools.0.label: pipe end
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Scrap_Pipe.tools.1.label: pipe
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Shishkebab.description: A legendary wasteland weapon - a makeshift flaming sword constructed from a motorcycle gas tank, pilot light, and lawnmower blade. The fuel-fed flames coat the blade, allowing it to slice and burn enemies simultaneously.
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Shishkebab.label: Shishkebab
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Shishkebab.tools.0.label: handle
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Shishkebab.tools.1.label: flaming blade
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Sledgehammer.description: A heavy sledgehammer designed for demolition work. Slow to swing, but delivers devastating blows that can crush bone and dent armor.
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Sledgehammer.label: Sledgehammer
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Sledgehammer.tools.0.label: handle
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Sledgehammer.tools.1.label: head
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Super_Sledge.description: A massive pre-war military sledgehammer enhanced with kinetic energy storage technology. Each swing releases tremendous force, capable of sending enemies flying and crushing power armor. A true wasteland legend.
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Super_Sledge.label: Super Sledge
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Super_Sledge.tools.0.label: handle
LanguageData.FCP_Melee_Super_Sledge.tools.1.label: kinetic head
